board.name: Q2 Fitness Challenge — 12 Weeks
board.description: Cut phase with strength preservation. Target: 15% body fat while maintaining bench and squat numbers. Daily tracking mandatory.

tasks.name: Body fat from 18% to 15%
tasks.description: Using Navy body fat measurement method. Weigh-in every Monday morning fasted. Progress photos every 2 weeks.

tasks.name: Maintain bench at 225 lbs
tasks.description: Running 5-3-1 program on cut. If bench drops below 205, increase calories by 200 per day.

tasks.name: Run 5K in under 22 minutes
tasks.description: Add interval training on leg days. Current time: 24:30. Target pace: 7 min/mile.

tasks.name: Push day A (heavy bench)
tasks.description: Flat bench 5x5, incline dumbbell 3x10, lateral raises 4x12, tricep pushdown 3x12.

tasks.name: Pull day A (deadlift focus)
tasks.description: Deadlift 5x3, pull-ups 4x8, barbell rows 4x8, face pulls 3x15.

tasks.name: Leg day A (squat focus)
tasks.description: Back squat 5x5, Romanian deadlift 3x10, walking lunges 3x12, calf raises 4x15.

tasks.name: Push day B (volume bench)
tasks.description: Incline bench 4x10, flat dumbbell press 3x12, cable flys 3x15, overhead tricep extension 3x12.

tasks.name: Pull day B (volume rows)
tasks.description: Barbell rows 4x10, lat pulldown 3x12, seated cable rows 3x12, rear delt flys 4x15.

tasks.name: Prep meals for Mon-Wed
tasks.description: Chicken breast 200g, rice 150g, broccoli 100g per meal. Pre-portion into containers Sunday evening.

tasks.name: Hit daily protein target (180g)
tasks.description: Breakfast: 3 eggs + protein shake (50g). Lunch: chicken (50g). Dinner: beef or fish (60g). Snack: Greek yogurt (20g).

tasks.name: Track calories in MyFitnessPal
tasks.description: Set target: 2400 kcal on training days, 2000 kcal on rest days. Log everything before bed.

tasks.name: Prep meals for Thu-Sat
tasks.description: Cook on Wednesday evening. Salmon with sweet potato for Thursday, lean beef stir fry for Friday.

tasks.name: Weekly progress photos
tasks.description: Front, side, back in consistent lighting. Upload to progress tracker every Sunday morning.

tasks.name: Log all workouts on spreadsheet
tasks.description: Track sets, reps, and RPE for every exercise. Note any shoulder or knee discomfort.

tasks.name: Measure sleep quality
tasks.description: Target: 7.5 hours average. Use sleep tracker to monitor. If below 6 hours, take deload week.

tasks.name: Take body measurements every 2 weeks
tasks.description: Neck, chest, waist, hips, thighs, arms. Use consistent tape measure position each time.

tasks.name: Book sports massage
tasks.description: Schedule deep tissue massage every 3 weeks. Focus on tight hip flexors and thoracic spine.

tasks.name: Daily mobility routine
tasks.description: 10 minutes every morning: hip CARs, cat-cow, shoulder dislocates, world's greatest stretch.

tasks.name: Plan Saturday refeed meal
tasks.description: Allowed one meal off-plan. Rotate between pizza, burgers, sushi. Keep portions reasonable.

tasks.name: Completed week 1 of cut
tasks.description: Lost 2 lbs of water weight. Strength maintained. Macros on point every day.

tasks.name: Bought new gym bag
tasks.description: Replaced old bag with separate compartments for gym shoes and dirty laundry.
